title: 🚀 Community Week starts next week! 🚀

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Group 17074847381920×1080 131 KB

Next week, we’re going all in!
A full week of exclusive content, created just for our community

We’re bringing our product teams directly to you for live discussions, AMAs, honest feedback conversations, swag giveaways, and a career growth webinar you won’t want to miss.

This is your space to ask questions, share ideas, challenge us, and get closer to the people building monday!

Everything is happening on our subreddit

All sessions are open to join - the only event that requires registration is the live webinar (sign up here).

Can’t wait to kick this off with you
